name: Preset submission
about: Propose a new method/preset as a .loop file
title: "preset: <method name>"
labels: ["preset", "good first issue"]
---

## Method

What method does this preset encode (e.g. BMAD, your own)?

## The `.loop` file

Paste the preset, or link a PR adding it under `packages/stdlib/`.

```loop
# your preset here
```

## How it differs

What's the philosophy — where does a human step in, what are the stages, what does "done" mean per stage?
